title: Time Tracker: Alert after 1-hr of recording

posts.author: Fraz1994 (Fraser)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Guys,

My Team tracks a lot of time, and sometimes forgets they’re recording.

Request: Could you alert users who have pressed ‘play’ on the timer after they’ve recorded 1 hour? I think this would stop a lot of miscalculated time.

Thanks,

Fraser

posts.author: Fraz1994 (Fraser)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi All,

What do we think of this?

Thanks,

posts.author: TeamEasy (Easy Mondays)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Fraz1994,

Sounds like ‘Delayed Status Change’ could help you here. It needs a couple of smaller things set up to support it, in terms of automations, and carries a small one-off cost.

You would be able to use this to create a reminder 1 hour after starting their timer this way.

Give us a shout if you get stuck!
teameasy@easy-mondays.com
